data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp uses a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Deployment of isolated microservices for messaging, authentication, media handling, etc.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All communication is encrypted from sender to receiver with encryption keys stored only on user devices.
data.technical_spec: Signal Protocol for encryption, using AES256 and RSA2048.

data.title: Data Sync and Consistency
data.description: Ensures user messages and media are synced across different devices consistently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes protocol buffers and local caches to manage data state.

data.title: Infrastructure
data.description: Runs on Facebook’s scalable cloud infrastructure to handle billions of active users.
data.technical_spec: Backbone of scalable distributed database systems and distributed queues.

data.title: Cross-Platform Compatibility
data.description: Enables application usage across different operating systems and devices.
data.technical_spec: Uses React Native for a unified codebase respecting native UX paradigms.
